title: DAC x Iron's Spells Reimagined
description: Transforms the bulky 3D icons from Dungeons And Combat x Iron's Spells into clean, stylish 2D visuals inspired by classic Minecraft
body:
![av](https://i.imgur.com/2CrjSB0.png)

## About

DAC x Iron's Spells Reimagined converts the bulky 3D GUI and item icons from Dungeons And Combat x Iron's Spells into a clean, vanilla-style 2D interface, making menus easier to read, visuals lighter, and the overall experience more immersive.

ℹ️ **Important:** This pack only affects the **GUI, HUD, and item icons**.  
It does not change world models, blocks, or gameplay mechanics.

**P.S.** You are welcome to use this resource pack in your modpacks

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Oe9OInf.png)

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/qKRZ31w.png)  

### What this resource pack changes:

*   5 items redesigned with clean **2D icons**
*   Bulky 3D GUI elements replaced with flat, readable visuals
*   Simplified **3D models** in vanilla Minecraft style
*   Improved readability during combat and inventory management  

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/JgTADfZ.png)

❔ **Will this pack break my game or the mod?**  
✅ No. This is a standard resource pack that only modifies visual elements and is completely safe to use.

❔ **Do I need OptiFine?**  
✅ No. The pack works perfectly without OptiFine.

❔ **Will new items be supported in future updates?**  
✅ Yes! New 2D icons and simplified 3D models will be added as Dungeons And Combat x Iron's Spells receives updates.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/n8EmaX9.png)

*   **Original Mod Author:** [skydude_](https://www.curseforge.com/members/skydude_/projects) — thanks for the amazing mod!

> **⚖️ Rights:** This project is a fan-made resource pack. All rights for the original mod belong to its creator, skydude_. We are simply enhancing its visual presentation.
